evidence: "It's captivating, exciting, funny, warm and heart warming."
"If you liked Muriel's Wedding then you will [probably] like this movie; if you like stories about dysfunctional Australian families, then you will [most likely] LOVE this movie."
"Though, a bit predictable, it still draws you in and you can't stop watching."
"It's quite typical of most disaster programs, but it has its moments..."
"It's captivating, exciting, funny, warm and heart warming."
"This series is kick-@$$. I love it; but, don't watch it alone !!!"
"This movie is not so much scary as it is thrilling and I love watching it every Halloween right before The Pit & The Pendulum."
"If you liked Twilight Zone, Night Gallery, Tales From The Crypt etc... Then you'll probably love this."
"I have loved this show since the very first one!"
"It's visual spectacle is much more vibrant with the cast and sets dressed and draped in much more color..."
"It's absolutely criminal that it is only available on VHS."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of comedy, drama, and horror, with a strong preference for fast-paced and engaging narratives. They appreciate visual spectacle and emotional depth in storytelling, while showing some sensitivity to production quality.
